ActionsEnabled.description: Indicates whether actions should be executed during any changes to the alarm state.

OKActions.description: The actions to execute when this alarm transitions to an OK state.

AlarmActions.description: The actions to execute when this alarm transitions to the ALARM state.

InsufficientDataActions.description: The actions to execute when this alarm transitions to the INSUFFICIENT_DATA state.

MetricName.description: The name for the metric associated with the alarm.

Namespace.description: The namespace for the metric associated with the alarm.

ExtendedStatistic.description: The percentile statistic for the metric specified in MetricName.

Dimensions.description: The dimensions for the metric specified in MetricName.

Period.description: The length, in seconds, used each time the metric specified in MetricName is evaluated.

EvaluationPeriods.description: The number of periods over which data is compared to the specified threshold.

DatapointsToAlarm.description: The number of data points that must be breaching to trigger the alarm.

Threshold.description: The value against which the specified statistic is compared.

TreatMissingData.description: Sets how this alarm is to handle missing data points.

EvaluateLowSampleCountPercentile.description: Used only for alarms based on percentiles.

Metrics.description: An array of MetricDataQuery structures for metric math expression alarms.

Tags.description: A list of key-value pairs to associate with the alarm.

ThresholdMetricId.description: If this is an alarm based on an anomaly detection model, make this value match the ID of the ANOMALY_DETECTION_BAND function.
